creator: itojun@mt.cs.keio.ac.jp
text:
I've put multilingual nvi ports, 
		nvi-1.79.m17n-970216.FreeBSD-ports2.tar.gz
	into
		ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/
	directory.  Please merge it into 2.2-RELEASE, if the time allows.

	This is my first ports.  If there are mistakes I would like to
	apologize.

	I am the maintener/author of multilingual patch for nvi, so please
	route any troubles to me.  Thanks!

Fix: 

(nothing)
How-To-Repeat: 
	(nothing)
